content: The line "For a long time, I went to bed early" is the opening sentence of Marcel Proust's novel "Swann's Way", which is the first volume of his famous work "In Search of Lost Time".
raw_content: The line "For a long time, I went to bed early" is the opening sentence of Marcel Proust's novel "Swann's Way", which is the first volume of his famous work "In Search of Lost Time".
